name: property managers handling 5–15 lease payments/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 lease payments/month, missed due dates cause late fees. We send automated reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendars.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking lease payment due dates
features: Simple dashboard for tracking due dates
Manual entry for lease payment details
